title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva Global Group - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva Global Group - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Salarpuria Sattva Global Group:
Salarpuria Sattva Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
